items.caption: A medicare health insurance card with a blue, red, and white color scheme. the card is personalized with the name "john doe" and includes a medicare claim number. it specifies that the card is entitled to hospital medical coverage and lists the effective dates as "01-01-2018" and "01-01-2018." the card also features the signature line at the bottom, which is signed by "john doe." the background is a gradient of gray tones, and the card is presented against a white border.
